Hannah.;More details here, shared by Calim Renton.;Could your home be the next winner of Scotland's Home of the Year?;Bright, airy exhibition space available in Leith in May;Birds in Greenspaces;Birds in Greenspaces | BTOAbout Birds in GreenspacesBirds in Greenspaces is a new, UK-wide citizen science survey of birds that use our public-access greenspaces. These spaces play many important roles for both birds and people, particularly in urban areas. For birds they offer resources and shelter that cannot be found in the surrounding built-up environment, and for people, are important hubs for socialising, exercise, and cultural activities. For many they are also the only accessible place to connect with the natural world, something which can be very beneficial for mental health.Home;More details here, shared by ROBERT, The Edinburgh Compassion Salon.;More details here, shared by Edinburgh Jazz 'n Jive Club.;More details here, shared by St Martin of Tours Episcopal Church.;More details here, shared by Muriel Binnie, Edinburgh Photographic Society.;Exhibition – Human Shapes as Photographic Language - Edinburgh Photographic SocietyA Retrospective by Eion Johnston - FRPS Creative photographic works in the form of panel of prints informed by and illustrating aspects of the human condition.Edinburgh Photographic SocietyEPS In-Person Only;More details here, shared by Donald Cameron, Director of Music, Blackhall St Columba's Church.;Aromatherapy Self Care Workshop;More details here, shared by info@catherinejacobsholistics.co.uk.;More details here, shared by a Minute reader.;The Scottish Wedding Unconvention Edinburgh | The Scottish WeddingEdinburgh!!!
